summary:
The `CsvReader` reads the CSV using the `ISO-8859-1` charset, which does not support all Unicode characters. This will cause issues with international names (the probable "needle" that can't be found).

To correctly handle all Unicode characters, it should use `UTF-8` instead. I will update `CsvReader.java` to use `Charset.forName("UTF-8")` instead of `"ISO-8859-1"`.
